post.summary: Returns Multi-Level CAD Parts List and Single-Level Consolidated Part and Assembly List, using Navigation criteria passed in navigationCriteria in the body.
post.description: Returns Multi-Level CAD Parts List and Single-Level Consolidated Part and Assembly List, using Navigation criteria passed in navigationCriteria in the body. NOTE: For ConfigSpecs and Filters enter them in JSON format. Example: "@odata.type":"#PTC.NavCriteria.WTPartStandardConfigSpec", "WorkingIncluded":true, "View":"Manufacturing"

post.summary: Get Structure of the CAD Document.If BOMMembersOnly is passed as true, then only BOM members will be shown in the structure.Relevant filters can be applied by providing the NavigationCriteria.
post.description: Get Structure of the CAD Document.If BOMMembersOnly is passed as true, then only BOM members will be shown in the structure.Relevant filters can be applied by providing the NavigationCriteria.
